channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Abyssus for PS5, Xbox Series launches June 25 alongside version 1.3 update
item.content:encoded:
The brinepunk cooperative first-person shooter.

Brinepunk cooperative first-person shooter Abyssus will launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on June 25 alongside the game’s version 1.3 update, publisher The Arcade Crew and developer DoubleMoose announced. A physical “Brine Edition,” including the base game and four cosmetic downloadable contents, will also be available for PlayStation 5 via distributor Silver Lining Interactive.

Abyssus first launched for PC via Steam on August 12, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via Silver Lining Interactive:

About

In Abyssus, players become brinepunk explorers diving into the sunken ruins of an ancient civilization. The goal is simple: claim a massive deposit of brine, a rare and powerful substance. The challenge is anything but. Corrupted denizens rise from the depths, turning your mission into a frantic battle for survival. Teamwork is survival. Up to four players can team up in cooperative play, carefully coordinating loadouts, skills, suits, and weapon mods. Each run is different, offering procedurally sequenced levels that keep every descent fresh and tense.

Key Features

  • Visceral, fast-paced first-person shooter action, with top-notch weapon feel and combat responsiveness.
  • Up to four-players cooperative play.
  • Roguelite meta progression with advancements, rewards, and unlocks.
  • 64 hand-crafted levels, procedurally sequenced to make every run a new experience.
  • Extensive character customization options.
  • 36 different enemies and four bosses that will put your skills to the challenge.
  • …and content arriving this summer with the free 1.3 content patch.

Brine Edition

The physical release comes packed with digital goodies! Here’s what players and collectors alike can expect from the super-charged Abyssus: Brine Edition for PlayStation 5:

  • A copy of the game
  • Downloadable content “Brinehunter” – Show the style and swagger with: Sea-weathered Birdcage Helmet, The Brineston Dance, Sea-weathered Frame
  • Downloadable content “Brineguard” – Show your unwavering commitment to your mission with: Juggernaut Helmet, Juggernaut Suit, Company Loyalty Emote, Brineguard Frame
  • Downloadable content “Brinefrost” – Put on fresh clothes to survive in a cool and charismatic fashion with Polar Helmet, Polar Suit, Brinefrost frame, Bringer of Gifts Emote
  • Downloadable content “Brinerot” – Featuring all new: Brinerotten Helmet & Suit, Pack of Brine emote, and Brinerot Portrait Frame inspired by heavy Brinepunk machinery.

Watch a new trailer below.

Version 1.3 Update and Consoles Release Date Trailer

“Brine Edition” Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/abyssus-for-ps5-xbox-series-launches-june-25-alongside-version-1-3-update
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea launches September 24
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Physical edition pre-orders now available.

Harvest Moon: Echoes of Teradea will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on September 24, Natsume announced. The PlayStation 5, Switch 2, and Switch versions will be available both physically and digitally.

Physical edition pre-orders are available now via Amazon (PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch) and Natsume’s online store, and include a free Wolf plus. The PlayStation 5 and Switch versions are priced at $49.99, while the Switch 2 version is priced at $59.99. The Switch 2 version is a Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.

Here is an overview of the game, via Natsume:

About

Farm, explore, and discover!

Embark on an unforgettable journey in the enchanting world of Teradea, where peaceful farm life meets thrilling adventure!

Raised in the quiet comfort of Bloomfield Village, your life is about to change forever. A mysterious mist creeps from the Forest of Echoes, wild beasts roam under the cover of night, and strange disasters threaten villages across the land.

Explore a vast, living landscape filled with hidden caves, remote islands, and lively towns. Build your farm, forge friendships, and even find love as you shape your destiny in Teradea. Travel alongside your animals – each with special abilities that help you leap across terrain, break through obstacles, and uncover valuable treasures.

Along the way, you’ll meet unforgettable allies like the Harvest Goddess and ingenious inventor Doc Jr., befriend powerful Guardian Spirits, and take on the mysteries behind earthquakes, violent storms, and a looming darkness that threatens everything you know.

Key Features

  • Massive Open World Exploration – Teradea is a sprawling world packed with diverse regions—from peaceful villages to lush wilderness. Explore maze-like caves filled with ore and gems, uncover nautical charts to reach remote islands, and discover rare collectibles and animals not found anywhere else.
  • Romance and Relationships – Meet and build relationships with 10 unique characters—5 bachelors and 5 bachelorettes. Form deep bonds, experience heartwarming events, and choose your perfect partner to build a life together.
  • Animal Companion System – Travel with a variety of animals, each offering unique abilities that go beyond simple companionship. Use them to reach hidden areas, destroy obstacles like rocks and fallen trees, and uncover secrets scattered across Teradea. Your companions are essential for both exploration and adventure!
  • Campsites and Travel System – The world is too large to explore in a single day! Set up at campsites to rest, recover stamina, and cook meals by the fire. Meet traveling merchants who offer exclusive items you won’t find anywhere else.
  • Expanded Player Movement – Jump, climb ladders, and scale vines to reach previously inaccessible areas. Combine your movement skills with your animal companions to fully explore every corner of the world.
  • Power Statue Mini-Challenges – Discover glowing Power Statues hidden throughout the world, each offering quick challenges or puzzles. Free dormant Power Wisps to earn Power Wisp Fruits, then trade them at the Forest Goddess Statue to boost stamina and unlock useful abilities.

View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/harvest-moon-echoes-of-teradea-launches-september-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: SNK establishes VS Studio led by Katsuhiro Harada
item.content:encoded:
"Beyond tradition, crafted to perfection."

SNK has announced the establishment of VS Studio, a new game development studio and subsidiary founded by Katsuhiro Harada of Tekken fame.

Harada left Bandai Namco at the end of 2025 after more than 31 years at the company. He was an executive game director, chief game producer, marketing director, and general manager, best known for his contributions to the Tekken series, which he worked on since 1994.

Headquartered in Shinagawa, Tokyo, VS Studio will collaborate with SNK on game software development to further strengthen their development capabilities.

“I am extremely proud to welcome Mr. Katsuhiro Harada, who has been a long-time friend and a worthy rival to us, into our group,” said SNK’s Yasuyuki Oda in a press release. “We’ve long discussed the hypothetical scenario of working together, and now that dream has become a reality. To be honest, nothing has been decided yet, but I have no doubt that things will become even more exciting than ever before. We look forward to your continued support for SNK and VS Studio.

Here is a comment from Harada on the studio’s establishment:

We are pleased to announce the launch of our new game development studio, VS Studio. VS Studio’s philosophy is “Beyond tradition, crafted to perfection.”

We will combine technology, sensibility, and world-class expertise to pursue the ultimate.

From a free, open, and spacious environment, we will generate new ideas and create memorable games.

We established this studio to bring this vision to life.

The “VS” in VS Studio holds various meanings. It represents our roots in “Video game Soft (VS Development Division),” the spirit of “Versus” challenging tradition, and many other meanings symbolizing innovation and challenge, such as “Visionary Standard,” “Volition Shift,” and “Vanguard Spirit.”

Having been involved in game development for many years, I’ve constantly considered how I want to spend my time as a developer and what kind of environment allows developers to perform at their best. VS Studio is one answer to that question.

By bringing together technology and knowledge, and working with passionate colleagues, we aim to deliver the best gaming experiences to users worldwide. VS Studio aspires to be a studio that continues to take on such challenges, and we are looking for new team members who share our vision.

Please look forward to the future of VS Studio.

Watch the announcement video below. Visit the official website here.

A Message from Katsuhiro Harada

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/snk-establishes-vs-studio-led-by-katsuhiro-harada
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
